stage_description: Stage 4 — option_generator active, domain_reasoner receives brainstormer pool for qualification (Option B additive), party_state feedback loop active

key_findings.stage4_primary_signal: Stage 4 PRIMARY SIGNAL MET. T5 option_pool shows combined_pool_count=11 (8 brainstormer + 3 domain expert), all 11 candidates domain_qualified, domain_blocked=0. S10 Stage 3 produced 4 self-generated domain_reasoner candidates. Stage 4 expanded the pool by 175% and the domain_reasoner qualified every candidate from both sources.
key_findings.creative_expansion: Brainstormer produced option families not present in S10: shared expense fund with automatic replenishment, emergency/routine two-track system, spending authority threshold with notification-only below line, prospective reimbursement window with documentation threshold, monthly reconciliation with rolling carryover. These represent genuinely different option architectures, not variations on the Stage 3 set.
key_findings.domain_expert_additions: Domain reasoner added 3 expert candidates: tiered approval system (notification/tacit/explicit tiers), receipt standard with substitute documentation provision, annual expense budget with categorical allocation. These are domain-practitioner options the brainstormer might not foreground — Option B (additive) is validated as the correct architecture choice.
key_findings.c5_improvement: C5 improves 4→5. T5 message presents six options spanning multiple option families: thresholds, pre-approved categories, notification protocols, tiered systems, documentation standards. S10's T5 named four candidates from one structural family. Stage 4's wider pool enabled the main model to present a meaningfully more diverse option set.
key_findings.session_trajectory: Session reaches agreement_building at T6 (T6: 'Both parents are open to a child-expense package built around advance notice, shared receipts, and a short reimbursement response window.'). S10 ended at T6 with continued interest_exploration. Stage 4's richer option set supported faster movement to a workable package.
key_findings.calibration_fixes: Two calibration fixes required during diagnostic run: (1) Guard fix — lm_engine.py guard `prior_readiness != 'blocked'` caused T1's block to cascade to T3 and T5, preventing brainstormer from running. Fix: removed prior_readiness gate; guard now only checks `prior_party_state is not None`. (2) max_tokens fix — domain_reasoner max_tokens=2048 insufficient for Stage 4 output (8 candidates × detailed qualification = ~4000-5000 tokens). Increased to 6000 to allow full qualification response without truncation.
key_findings.safety_veto_labeling_issue: Minor data quality issue: T1 and T3 show safety_veto_applied=True in option_pool.json because option_readiness='blocked'. These turns are correctly blocked (no party input, only one party heard) but the block reason is insufficient session state, not a genuine safety veto. The domain_reasoner may be misapplying Veto Category 1 when Party B has not yet had an opportunity to speak. T5 correctly withholds safety veto. This labeling issue is non-blocking for Stage 4 purposes but should be addressed in Stage 5.
key_findings.p6_improvement: P6 improves 4→5. Domain reasoner qualification discipline is maintained and extended: all 11 candidates receive explicit feasibility_rationale, confidence level (high/moderate), prerequisite_parameters list, and conditions. No candidates were improperly qualified or blocked. The qualification gate is functioning correctly at the expanded pool size.
key_findings.t1_t3_correctly_blocked: T1 and T3 correctly blocked. T1: no party input. T3: only Party A has spoken. Option_readiness correctly prevents option work at these turns. Brainstormer at T3 generated 8 candidates (domain_reasoner correctly blocked all 8 with explicit blocking rationale per candidate). This demonstrates the brainstormer running and the domain_reasoner correctly filtering.

regression_checks.c9_no_false_escalation: PASS — M0 correctly maintained throughout. No threshold-relevant caution.
regression_checks.c1_process_integrity: PASS — Solomon did not make substantive decisions. Option presentation maintains bounded framing.
regression_checks.c6_fair_process: PASS — Both parties heard before T5. Party B's workability/control concern integrated alongside Party A's documentation concern.
regression_checks.p6_qualification_not_degraded: PASS — domain_qualified count (11) >= S10 qualified count (4). No regression in qualification quality.

new_option_families: shared expense fund with automatic replenishment
receipt standard with substitute documentation provision
annual expense budget with categorical allocation

delta.note: Stage 4 produces meaningful improvement across all primary diagnostic dimensions. The option_pool.json artifact provides evaluators with full visibility into the three-layer pool and the domain reasoner's qualification rationale per candidate.

open_items: Run D-B04-S05 Stage 4 regression check on simpler baseline
Address safety_veto labeling at T1/T3 — blocked due to insufficient session state should be distinguishable from blocked due to genuine veto trigger
Document calibration fixes (guard removal, max_tokens=6000) in STAGE4-FINDINGS-041.md
